title: Target gap registry freeze
acceptance: All five target groups and 20 target public gaps are listed with registry ids priorities gates and source rows

title: ReleaseGateRecord and conformance manifest schema
acceptance: Release gates have stable uuid status controlling spec evidence ctest label and closure authority fields

title: Target zero-grey enforcement tool
acceptance: Target-only gate fails on any open target gap stale registry missing evidence missing CTest label or non-passing target test

title: Public gap registry status updater
outputs: registry update workflow and audit command
acceptance: Implemented work can update target gap status only with passing evidence references and source inventory synchronization

title: Target evidence manifest
acceptance: Every target gap has required CTest labels evidence artifacts implementation refs and closure rule before implementation starts

title: Preflight baseline inventories
acceptance: Current TLS catalog constraints and MGA recovery state are inventoried before code changes

title: Persistent format and migration policy
acceptance: All durable catalog constraint checkpoint dirty manifest backup delta and PITR changes have version upgrade repair and refusal behavior

title: Fault-injection matrix
acceptance: Security catalog constraint and recovery failure modes have expected outcomes and required gates

title: Agent write-scope and heartbeat matrix
acceptance: Agents have disjoint write ownership read permissions forbidden paths and heartbeat status schema before implementation starts

title: Canonical SQL object synonym contracts
acceptance: Manifest-listed canonical specs define first-class SQL object synonyms before implementation begins

title: TLS drift baseline and threat model
acceptance: Current config-only TLS drift is mapped to implementation tasks diagnostics and tests

title: Listener and server SBWP/TLS termination
acceptance: Client to listener to parser/server path performs TLS handshake and refuses plaintext when policy requires TLS

title: Engine-authorized authentication binding
acceptance: Credentials channel binding mTLS subject mapping and deny message vectors route through engine security authority

title: TLS negative and interoperability gates
acceptance: sbwp_tls_server_listener_gate sbwp_tls_engine_auth_gate and sbwp_tls_negative_policy_gate pass

title: TLS fixture policy
acceptance: Generated cert CA mTLS expired wrong CA plaintext denied and channel-binding mismatch fixtures are defined under build/

title: Catalog physical index and information projection naming decisions
acceptance: Catalog index profiles and user-facing projection naming are decided before catalog code lands

title: SQL object synonym implementation
acceptance: First-class SQL synonym objects implement the manifest-listed synonym specs with parent scoped unique names target object references bounded chain resolution cycle detection dependency edges and parent remap behavior

title: Catalog common descriptor and row codec closure
acceptance: All required common columns lifecycle epoch owner transaction and audit fields are encoded and validated

title: sys.catalog table materialization
acceptance: Required sys.catalog tables are physical catalog objects with UUID identities and visible catalog rows

title: Name and comment resolver table closure
acceptance: Names and comments are stored in resolver tables not duplicated inside authoritative catalog object tables

title: Catalog generation MGA commit handshake
acceptance: DDL allocates pending generation commits through MGA and rolls back provisional descriptors on rollback

title: Catalog dependency graph API
acceptance: Dependency graph stores source target and dependency set UUIDs and supports DDL validation traversal

title: sys.catalog_readable projections
acceptance: Security-filtered readable views resolve names comments and hide raw UUIDs where required

title: sys.information projections and legacy synonym object
acceptance: Canonical sys.information views exist with resolver-backed names and security filtering while sys.information_schema is a first-class synonym object that resolves to sys.information and never owns children

title: Catalog diagnostics and wire metadata
outputs: diagnostic registry and driver metadata code
acceptance: Catalog invalid states emit stable diagnostics and wire metadata derives from descriptor UUID authority

title: Constraint catalog descriptor model
acceptance: Constraint key and support-structure descriptors are UUID authoritative catalog objects

title: Constraint DDL and parser lowering
acceptance: CREATE ALTER DROP constraint and key commands lower to SBLR/catalog envelopes and commit under MGA

title: DML constraint enforcement
acceptance: NOT NULL DEFAULT CHECK PK UNIQUE FK and exclusion behavior enforce before visible commit

title: Constraint transaction visibility and savepoints
acceptance: Deferred constraints savepoint rollback DDL rollback and concurrent visibility follow MGA rules

title: Constraint diagnostics and reference mapping
outputs: diagnostic registry and reference render interfaces
acceptance: Constraint failures emit canonical diagnostics and reference render hooks without making reference messages authority

title: Constraint backing-index dependency policy
acceptance: Primary unique foreign and exclusion constraints define required backing index support and build order

title: MGA recovery proof model
acceptance: Recovery authority uses transaction inventory page state checkpoint dirty manifest and operation envelopes only

title: Checkpoint generation and dirty manifest emission
acceptance: Checkpoint generation emits hashed dirty object manifests with transaction and operation envelope evidence

title: Startup recovery manifest consumption
acceptance: Startup recovery consumes manifests idempotently and falls back to bounded scan or fail-closed quarantine

title: Backup and restore manifest proof
acceptance: Backup restore manifests include checksum signature timeline fork key-lineage and coverage validation

title: MGA delta package and apply coverage
acceptance: Delta package/apply records contiguous coverage gaps timeline identity and non-authoritative stream proof

title: PITR restore points and rollforward
acceptance: Restore target selection by transaction timestamp named point or latest-valid validates coverage and replays deterministically

title: Page durability and mutation ordering
acceptance: MGA visibility is never published before durability fence and allocation maps never reference non-durable generations

title: Full-route acceptance fixture contract
acceptance: End-to-end route fixture defines client SBWP/TLS listener parser IPC server engine catalog constraint and recovery checks

title: Full route integration regression
acceptance: SBSQL over SBWP/TLS through listener parser IPC server engine exercises catalog constraints and MGA recovery paths

title: Final target zero-grey audit
acceptance: All target gaps are implemented_in_full target gate passes and global open count is reduced with no regressions

title: Global non-target regression audit
acceptance: Full public zero-grey failures are proven to be outside target scope and no closed or target row regressed
